title: Volatility Analytics — Bloomberg-style vol cone, GARCH forecast, regime detection

observation.gap_identified: No volatility surface analytics — Bloomberg PORT shows vol cone, term structure, GARCH forecast, vol risk premium, and vol regime on every equity page. Aegis had GARCH vol as a single number in stock analysis but no decomposed vol analytics.

implementation.feature_built: Full volatility analytics service with 8 components: (1) Volatility Cone — percentile bands at 10d/30d/60d/90d/180d/252d lookbacks showing where current vol sits vs historical distribution, (2) Realized Vol Term Structure — current vol at each horizon, (3) Vol Regime Detection — high/normal/low classification based on 30d vol percentile, (4) Vol Risk Premium — implied vs realized vol spread when options data available, (5) Vol Clustering — ARCH effect detection via Ljung-Box test on squared returns, (6) Vol-of-Vol — second-order vol metric for risk stability, (7) Parkinson & Garman-Klass estimators — OHLC-based efficient vol estimators, (8) GARCH Forward Curve — model-based vol forecast out 1/5/10/30/60/90 days with arch package (EWMA fallback). Wired into stock analysis response as lightweight summary, dedicated endpoint for full detail.

limitations: Vol risk premium depends on options_intelligence having ATM IV data — falls back to IV rank when unavailable
GARCH forward curve uses arch package which is already installed; EWMA fallback for environments without it
Vol cone percentiles computed from available history (5y default) — longer history would improve percentile accuracy
assessment.self_critique: Could have added vol surface visualization data (strike-by-expiry IV grid) but that requires options chain data at multiple strikes which isn't currently fetched. The current implementation focuses on realized vol analytics which are always available from price data alone.

next_steps: Add vol-adjusted position sizing recommendations based on vol regime
Build options vol surface (strike × expiry IV grid) when options chain data is available
Add cross-asset vol correlation analysis (how does this stock's vol correlate with VIX?)
Wire vol regime into signal engine as an additional component
